stemHtml: An overtaking aircraft is an aircraft that approaches another aircraft from the rear on a line forming an angle of less than…

options.a: 80 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the latter.
options.b: 60 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the latter.
options.c: 70 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the latter.
options.d: 50 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the latter.
